HomePage.title: Agent Workflow Hub
HomePage.hero_subtitle: Stop feeding AI your entire codebase. Eliminate context bloat, cure AI amnesia, and enforce pixel-perfect UI consistency with a memory-persistent architecture built for enterprise scale.
HomePage.feature_1_desc: Don't waste thousands of tokens on irrelevant files. Our proprietary STATE.md architecture creates a hyper-focused, lightweight RAM that keeps your AI lightning fast and relentlessly accurate.
HomePage.feature_1_prob: Traditional chats collapse under massive context windows.
HomePage.feature_1_sol: A strict 20-line state file guarantees maximum performance.
HomePage.feature_2_desc: Never explain your project rules again. Our seamless One-Click Handoff engine perfectly encapsulates architectural decisions, bug histories, and ongoing tasks across unlimited chat sessions.
HomePage.feature_2_prob: Starting a new session resets your AI's brain completely.
HomePage.feature_2_sol: State preservation ensures zero loss of critical context.
HomePage.feature_3_desc: Lock down your Design System. The protocol forces the AI to strictly ingest and adhere to your UI guidelines before it is allowed to touch a single line of frontend code.
HomePage.feature_3_prob: Autonomous agents hallucinate colors and destroy layouts.
HomePage.feature_3_sol: Design tokens enforce absolute visual conformity.
HomePage.feature_4_desc: Execute autonomous code with absolute confidence. Our framework features recursive Git Hooks and OS-level write locks to prevent catastrophic file corruption and API key leaks.
HomePage.feature_4_prob: Raw AI agents accidentally expose secrets or overwrite critical files.
HomePage.features_section_subtitle: Traditional AI chats collapse under their own weight. We built a framework that scales with your ambition.
HomePage.portfolio_subtitle: Discover the enterprise-grade tools, workflows, and frameworks engineered to accelerate autonomous development.
HomePage.project_1_desc: The flagship memory-persistent framework to eliminate context amnesia for AI agents.
HomePage.project_2_desc: A radically modern content management infrastructure built natively on Next.js.
HomePage.project_3_desc: The definitive hub for discovering and installing Model Context Protocol servers.
HomePage.problem_section_subtitle: As projects scale, developers often encounter architectural bottlenecks in how data is fed to AI. This protocol solves three main issues:
HomePage.problem_1_desc: The longer you chat, the more old code and logs fill up the AI's memory. This causes the AI to hallucinate, forget important variables, and waste API tokens.
HomePage.problem_2_desc: When the chat gets too slow, you have to start a new one. But then the AI forgets your project structure, database schema, and the bugs you just fixed 5 minutes ago.
HomePage.problem_3_desc: If you let the AI design web pages freely, it will invent random CSS classes and use incorrect brand colors, resulting in a messy and inconsistent UI.

ManualPage.title: Enterprise Manual
ManualPage.subtitle: Deep-dive documentation for the AI Coding Protocol, complete with structural guides and AI prompting templates.
ManualPage.sec_1_desc: Getting started is very easy. This step creates the 'Second Brain' for the AI in your project.
ManualPage.sec_1_step_1: Open Terminal and navigate to your project folder: cd ~/my-app
ManualPage.sec_1_step_3_a: .ai/STATE.md - Acts as the RAM for active tasks.
ManualPage.sec_1_step_3_b: .ai/REFLECTIONS.md - Acts as a ledger for solved bugs.
ManualPage.sec_1_step_3_c: .ai/docs/ - Acts as the Hard Drive for system documentation.
ManualPage.sec_1_note: Optional: We highly recommend installing the Git Hook to prevent .env uploads:
ManualPage.sec_2_desc: Controlling the UI is critical for enterprise projects. If uncontrolled, AI will hallucinate colors and classes. We provide 4 distinct templates.
ManualPage.sec_2_tpl_1_desc: Clean, Vercel/Linear style aesthetics using monochrome Tailwind utility classes. Inspiration: vercel.com, linear.app
ManualPage.sec_2_tpl_2_desc: Focuses on backdrop-blur, translucency, and dark theme aesthetics. Inspiration: apple.com, framer.com
ManualPage.sec_2_tpl_3_desc: High contrast, colorful accents, and bold typography. Inspiration: stripe.com
ManualPage.sec_2_tpl_4_desc: High data-density layouts perfect for internal dashboards and SaaS backends. Inspiration: github.com, aws.amazon.com
ManualPage.sec_2_prompt_title: 🎯 How to Prompt the AI for UI
ManualPage.sec_2_prompt_desc: Once your template is set, paste this exact prompt whenever you ask the AI to build a new interface:
ManualPage.sec_2_prompt_code: Before writing any UI code, strictly read and internalize .ai/docs/ui_guidelines.md. Do NOT invent new colors or classes outside of these guidelines. Inline CSS is strictly forbidden.
ManualPage.sec_3_desc: To prevent Context Bloat, you must force the AI to work in short cycles (Micro-Tasks).
ManualPage.sec_3_step_1: 1. Start Work: Open a new chat and prime the AI's memory.
ManualPage.sec_3_prompt_start: Please read .ai/STATE.md and .ai/REFLECTIONS.md to understand the current context. Then tell me what your next task is.
ManualPage.sec_3_step_2: 2. Micro-Tasks: Command the AI to edit 1-2 files at a time. Never ask for a massive feature all at once.
ManualPage.sec_3_step_3: 3. End Task: Force the AI to save its progress back to the file.
ManualPage.sec_3_prompt_end: We have completed this micro-feature. Please update .ai/STATE.md by crossing off the completed markdown task and adding the next steps.
ManualPage.sec_4_desc: Keeping memory files small and concise saves tokens and keeps the AI highly intelligent.
ManualPage.sec_4_desc_1: Log only active tasks. Good Example: 'Build Login Button'. Bad Example: Pasting the entire Login code. To clear the state for a new major feature, run:
ManualPage.sec_4_desc_2: When a tough bug is fixed, tell the AI to log the solution here. If it exceeds 15 entries, archive old ones:
ManualPage.sec_4_desc_3: Record major architectural shifts, e.g., 'We migrated from Redux to Zustand'. The AI will reference this permanently.
ManualPage.sec_5_desc: When a chat reaches 20-30 messages, it slows down (Context Bloat). You must start a new chat using Handoff.
ManualPage.sec_5_step_1: 1. Run the Handoff command in Terminal:
ManualPage.sec_5_step_2: 2. The system consolidates STATE.md and REFLECTIONS.md into a single text block (saved in .ai/HANDOFF.md).
ManualPage.sec_5_step_3: 3. Open a brand new chat window.
ManualPage.sec_5_step_4: 4. Paste the contents of HANDOFF.md into the new chat. The AI is now fully refreshed but remembers everything.
ManualPage.sec_6_desc: You can monitor the project status (like an AI monitor screen) via the Terminal.
ManualPage.sec_6_note: The system renders .ai/*.md files as a clean CLI UI, so you don't have to manually open the files.
ManualPage.sec_7_desc: Forcing AI to read long API docs (e.g., Stripe API) wastes massive tokens. We use Google NotebookLM as an external 'library'.
ManualPage.sec_7_step_2_note: 💡 Smart Feature: If you use Chrome, the system temporarily borrows your cookie to login automatically (secure and fast).
ManualPage.sec_7_step_3: 3. Feed the Library: Paste long code or manuals into a notebook at notebooklm.google.com.
ManualPage.sec_7_prompt_title: 🎯 How to Prompt the AI for Research
ManualPage.sec_7_prompt_desc: Once connected, use this prompt when you need deep external knowledge:
ManualPage.sec_7_prompt_code: Connect to NotebookLM and search the 'Stripe API Docs' notebook. Tell me how to implement the latest Payment Intent securely.
ManualPage.sec_8_tr_2_2: Scans for exposed secrets (.env) before commits
ManualPage.sec_8_tr_3_2: Archives old REFLECTIONS.md entries to prevent bloat
ManualPage.sec_8_tr_4_2: Backs up old STATE.md and creates a fresh one
ManualPage.sec_8_tr_5_2: Condenses AI memory and state into a single prompt block
ManualPage.sec_8_tr_6_2: Displays the project monitor in Terminal
ManualPage.sec_8_tr_8_2: Installs the Model Context Protocol connection
ManualPage.sec_8_tr_9_2: Authenticates Google automatically via Chrome Cookie
